title: CLASP aisystemuse.ext
description: Engineering-standards intended-use vocabulary, populated into the ext field of a CoMP AISystemUse object. See clause 'Extension: aisystemuse.ext' of CLASP-0.1.

target_edition.description: Specific edition. For comparison tools, interpreted as the 'from' edition.

target_edition_compare.description: Additional edition for comparison tools (list_changes). When populated, target_edition is the 'from' and this is the 'to'. MUST NOT be populated unless at least one comparison tool is intended for the session.

target_clauses_numbering.description: Which edition's numbering target_clauses references. Default is 'to'. MUST NOT be populated when target_edition_compare is empty.

preferred_languages.description: Ordered list of preferred renderings; Content Owner returns first available match or canonical_language.

requester_sectors.description: Industry sectors of the requester. Same value space as scope.ext.industry_sectors.

allOf.description: target_clauses_numbering MUST NOT be populated unless target_edition_compare is also populated.
